svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: dark;

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(55, 71, 79), rgb(167, 181, 188)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(55, 71, 79), rgb(167, 181, 188));

rect.style: fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));
